description_long: This lamp features a robust, streamlined metal housing with a matte black finish, giving it a modern industrial appearance. The front is dominated by a large, amber-tinted glass lens that likely serves to diffuse and color the emitted light. The lamp is mounted on a sturdy, angular bracket with visible bolts, suggesting it is designed for secure attachment to a wall or other vertical surface. The rear of the lamp is smoothly contoured, tapering to a point, and the overall shape is reminiscent of a classic spotlight or headlamp. The materials and construction indicate durability and weather resistance, suitable for outdoor urban environments. The design is functional with minimal decorative elements, focusing on utility and strength.
description: A robust, industrial-style wall-mounted lamp with a black metal body and a large amber glass lens, designed for outdoor use. Its streamlined shape and sturdy bracket emphasize durability and functionality.
description_view_0: Front view showing the wide amber glass lens and the opening of the lamp, highlighting the reflective interior.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the streamlined black metal housing and the mounting bracket beneath.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the pointed, contoured back of the lamp and the full mounting bracket.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the metal housing and bracket, with the amber lens partially visible.
